question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

assessment.note: The answer 'timing with kids' indicates a personal challenge affecting work engagement and clarity.

new_queue.label: Lateness impact
new_queue.name: What do you think is contributing to your lateness?

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Manager support
new_queue.name: What support from me would make a difference right now?

new_queue.label: Workload clarity
new_queue.name: Where do you feel your workload is heaviest right now?

new_queue.label: Team interactions
new_queue.name: How are you finding the team dynamics lately?
